name: Fanuc CNC 数控系统
description: FANUC Series 0i-MF数控系统，支持Modbus TCP数据采集，适用于车床、铣床、加工中心

points.name: spindle_speed
points.description: 主轴实际转速，粗加工工位：空闲为0，启动后稳定在约2000RPM，每件节拍有随机差异

points.name: feed_rate
points.description: 粗加工实际进给速度：切入爬升，稳定粗铣约800mm/min含拐角减速扰动，退出降速，空闲为0

points.name: spindle_current
points.description: 粗加工主轴电流：空闲约2A，启动约6A，切入峰值约23A，稳定粗铣约19~24A含细碎波动，退刀降低

points.name: vibration_x
points.description: X轴振动加速度，粗铣切削时约0.4~0.9m/s²，空闲时接近0

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']
cycle_idx = int(elapsed // 180)
ck = f'vx_{cycle_idx}'
if ck not in cache:
    rng = random.Random(cycle_idx * 7 + 4)
    cache[ck] = {'dur': rng.randint(-8, 10)}
period = 180 + cache[ck]['dur']; t = elapsed % period
cut_end = period - 25 - 8
cutting = 40 <= t < cut_end
if cutting:
    base = 0.55 + 0.22 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 85 + 0.8) + 0.1 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 17.3)
    noise = random.uniform(-0.12, 0.12)
else:
    base = 0.04
    noise = random.uniform(-0.02, 0.02)
result = round(max(0.0, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_y
points.description: Y轴振动加速度，粗铣切削时约0.4~0.9m/s²，空闲时接近0

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']
cycle_idx = int(elapsed // 180)
ck = f'vy_{cycle_idx}'
if ck not in cache:
    rng = random.Random(cycle_idx * 7 + 5)
    cache[ck] = {'dur': rng.randint(-8, 10)}
period = 180 + cache[ck]['dur']; t = elapsed % period
cut_end = period - 25 - 8
cutting = 40 <= t < cut_end
if cutting:
    base = 0.5 + 0.2 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 70 + 1.8) + 0.08 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 13.7)
    noise = random.uniform(-0.1, 0.1)
else:
    base = 0.04
    noise = random.uniform(-0.02, 0.02)
result = round(max(0.0, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_z
points.description: Z轴振动加速度，粗铣切削时约0.5~1.1m/s²（Z向切深方向幅值略大），空闲时接近0

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']
cycle_idx = int(elapsed // 180)
ck = f'vz_{cycle_idx}'
if ck not in cache:
    rng = random.Random(cycle_idx * 7 + 6)
    cache[ck] = {'dur': rng.randint(-8, 10)}
period = 180 + cache[ck]['dur']; t = elapsed % period
cut_end = period - 25 - 8
cutting = 40 <= t < cut_end
if cutting:
    base = 0.65 + 0.28 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 58 + 2.8) + 0.12 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 11.2)
    noise = random.uniform(-0.15, 0.15)
else:
    base = 0.05
    noise = random.uniform(-0.02, 0.02)
result = round(max(0.0, base + noise), 3)

points.name: spindle_load
points.description: 粗加工主轴负载率，稳定粗铣约48~68%含刀路扰动，切入瞬间约65~75%，空闲接近0，短时允许到120%

points.name: exec_status
points.description: 执行状态(0=空闲 1=运行 2=暂停 3=M00停 4=M01停)

points.name: tool_no
points.description: 当前刀具号，粗加工工位固定使用T1
